summary: Frontend-only end-to-end testing of Ultras Hub (single-file index.html). All 8 requested feature areas verified end-to-end against the live preview URL. Nav (7 pages), news slider, ticker, news modals with correct translate-btn vs visit-btn behavior, saudi/world clubs, 32 stars with photos + social links, matches scoreboard (11 scorebugs), and LIVE YouTube player with forced Arabic subs + piped.video geo-bypass toggle — all pass. Escape/close buttons work.
verified_flows: nav-home/matches/news/saudi/world/stars/live testids all present and switch pages
HOME: hero renders, 10 news-slide cards from live RSS, news-ticker scrolling with red badge

NEWS: 31 news-card items. MARCA opens modal with translate-btn href = https://translate.google.com/translate?sl=auto&tl=ar&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.marca.com (correct); كووورة opens modal with visit-btn href = https://www.kooora.com (correct — no translate-btn)
SAUDI: 18 club-cards, first opens modal with visit-btn (arabic, correct)
WORLD: 25 club-cards, Real Madrid opens modal with translate-btn href pointing to translate.google.com wrapping realmadrid.com (correct)
STARS: 32 star-card elements in DOM with player photos; clicking opens modal with 5 info-link social entries
MATCHES: after ~16s wait, 11 .scorebug elements rendered (TheSportsDB fetch works)

LIVE: 8 live-card, clicking opens player modal. Iframe src contains hl=ar&cc_lang_pref=ar&cc_load_policy=1 (forced Arabic subs verified). alt-player-btn toggles src to piped.video/embed and back to youtube.com/embed correctly.
Modal close: Escape closes info-modal, info-close button works, player-close works
critical_code_review_comments: Tailwind CDN is used in production (Tailwind team's own warning fires in console). Non-blocking, but recommend Tailwind CLI/build for a real production deploy.
Live YouTube video IDs are placeholders (e.g., dQw4w9WgXcQ) — noted as by-design in the request; consider replacing with real live channel IDs when available.
index.html is 1362 lines / single-file — acceptable given the 'single self-contained HTML' product decision, but future features should be split.
Some 404s in console for a few asset URLs (favicons / thesportsdb badges). onerror handlers hide the images, so no visible impact — non-blocking as flagged in review request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-file app served at frontend root. All 8 feature requirements from the request pass. Matches page needs ~15s wait for TheSportsDB. Piped.video geo-bypass only needs src-switch verification (stream availability is external). AR_KEYS logic correctly gates translate-btn vs visit-btn.
